pi_items.source: task.json description field (Initial Stop Loss: 20 ticks) and NinjaTrader ATM documentation confirms this is a valid user-defined parameter
task.json description field (Initial Profit Target: 40 ticks) and NinjaTrader ATM documentation confirms this is a valid user-defined parameter

task.json description field (Profit Trigger: 10 ticks) and NinjaTrader Auto Breakeven documentation at https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/auto_breakeven.htm confirms 'Profit Trigger' is a valid parameter
task.json description field (Plus: 1 tick (to cover commissions)) and NinjaTrader Auto Breakeven documentation confirms 'Plus' is a valid parameter

task.json description field (Step 1 Profit Trigger: 15 ticks) and NinjaTrader Auto Trail documentation at https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/auto_trail.htm confirms 'Profit Trigger' is a valid Auto Trail parameter
task.json description field (Step 1 Stop Loss: 5 ticks) and NinjaTrader Auto Trail documentation confirms 'Stop Loss' is a valid Auto Trail parameter
task.json description field (Step 1 Frequency: 1 tick) and NinjaTrader Auto Trail documentation confirms 'Frequency' is a valid Auto Trail parameter

privileged_info_summary: This task requires configuring an ATM (Advanced Trade Management) strategy in NinjaTrader 8 with template name 'Scalp_Protector'. All verified configuration parameters are: Initial Stop Loss of 20 ticks, Profit Target of 40 ticks, Auto-Breakeven enabled with Profit Trigger at 10 ticks and Plus of 1 tick, and Auto-Trail enabled with Step 1 Profit Trigger at 15 ticks, Step 1 Stop Loss at 5 ticks, and Step 1 Frequency of 1 tick. All metadata values are directly stated in the task description and validated against official NinjaTrader documentation. The values represent reasonable risk management parameters for a scalping strategy.
